scripts.lint: biome ci src docs README.md package.json tsconfig.json sst.config.ts .github
scripts.format: biome format src docs README.md package.json tsconfig.json sst.config.ts .github
scripts.format:fix: biome format --write src docs README.md package.json tsconfig.json sst.config.ts .github
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
